summary: Indonesia public-only skeleton for source discovery across data.go.id, OJK public information, and term-review boundaries for AHU/OSS company status paths. It does not expose paid AHU company profiles, directors, shareholders, capital, deed history, or hosted bulk lookup.

auth.notes: The skeleton has no live credentialed adapter. Any AHU, OSS, or licensed-provider integration must define ID_API_* credentials and approved terms before use.

licensing.notes: data.go.id and OJK public pages can support source discovery. AHU company-profile downloads, OSS automation, director/shareholder/capital/deed data, and hosted redistribution require separate terms review or authorised access.

freshness.refreshCadence: manual source review until AHU/OSS terms and access paths are approved

publicDataLimits.message: This pack documents Indonesia source boundaries and does not perform a live AHU, OSS, or OJK company lookup.
Do not fetch, cache, redistribute, or resell AHU profile, director, shareholder, capital, or deed-history data without authorised terms.
Outputs are public-source planning artifacts and not legal, tax, credit, investment, or licensed compliance advice.

tools.name: id_public_registry_brief
tools.purpose: Document Indonesia public-source availability, AHU/OSS/OJK boundaries, and next steps for a user-supplied company name, NIB, or registration identifier.

publicDataLimits.message: The skeleton may cite source boundaries but must not return AHU company-profile, officer, shareholder, capital, deed, or paid extract rows.

expectedGaps.message: Authoritative AHU profile retrieval requires approved access terms before live lookup, caching, or redistribution.

contributionNotes: Review AHU, OSS, OJK, and data.go.id terms for automated access, caching, attribution, rate limits, and commercial hosted use before adding adapters.
Use ID_API_* environment variables for future credentials and keep them server-side only.
Add recorded-source tests for public discovery, no-match, ambiguous-match, upstream failure, paid-profile blocked paths, and stale source metadata.
Preserve provenance, freshness, gaps, and limits in every output.
